positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a roaring cosmic feline lion silhouette embracing the Milky Way galaxy. The lion is depicted with celestial paws and glowing nebulae accents. The background is a deep indigo and violet gradient, transitioning into stardust specks and subtle cosmic dust clouds. Use a graphic, modern neo-art deco aesthetic with strong black lines and vibrant pops of cyan, magenta, and gold. The composition should be centered, creating a bold, impactful emblem suitable for a t-shirt print. High contrast, vector art feel, clean silhouette, cosmic vaporwave theme. Focus on scalable, crisp lines.
